repair.reason: Original F1 checker required bundled from_ABC/to_ABC fields, but the inspected sources expose split A/B/C fields directly.

source_field_families.meaning: Split A/B/C transition fields are present directly as from_A, to_A, from_B, to_B, from_C, to_C, and C_delta/integer_C_delta. The apparatus exposes A/B assignment surfaces without requiring a bundled from_ABC field.
source_field_families.repair_note: Repaired strict checker: F1 now accepts split native A/B/C fields rather than only bundled from_ABC/to_ABC fields.

source_field_families.meaning: Slot fields may bind tuple motion to source construction positions.
Role fields identify whether A/B assignment is tied to WXYZTI station role or role class.
shared_B and reverse_partner fields are the immediate role-labeled universe frontier.
Selector/rank fields record residue of source law but are not source law by themselves.
